title: How to install / delete cars manually

messages.content: # Wondering how to install and/or delete cars manually directly in the game folder, follow this guide!

# How to install a car manually
## Step 1
> Download and install 7zip
> [**7zip**](<https://www.7-zip.org/>) is free.

## Step 2
> Download the cars from our [**Content Delivery Network**](https://cdn.nohesi.gg/)

## Step 3
> 1. Right click the downloaded ZIP file -> click `7zip` -> `Extract Here`
> -# Windows 11 users will need to click `show more options` before they can find 7zip.

> 2. Move the **extracted** folder, into your car's folder. (<#1322235675239645184> -> Content -> Cars)

## VIDEO GUIDE

# How to delete a car manually
## Step 1
> Open your <#1322235675239645184> and navigate to `content > cars`

## Step 2
> Find the car you want to delete, right-click on it then click `delete`

## Video Guide
